description_long: This is a red aluminum beverage can with a silver pull-tab top, commonly used for carbonated soft drinks. The can features a bold white 'Coke' logo in large letters, with a diagonal silver stripe containing the word 'GENERIC!' near the top. Nutritional information, a barcode, and recycling symbols are printed in white on the back side of the can. The surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light, and the can has a standard cylindrical shape with slightly indented top and bottom rims. The can appears undamaged, with no visible dents or scratches, and the cap is a typical pull-tab style integrated into the aluminum top. The overall design is visually striking, with high contrast between the red background and white and silver text elements.
description: A red aluminum soda can with a white 'Coke' logo, silver pull-tab top, and detailed labeling. The can is glossy, cylindrical, and undamaged.
description_view_0: Side view showing the silver 'GENERIC!' stripe and partial 'Coke' logo, with some nutritional text visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full 'Coke' logo and the prominent silver diagonal stripe with 'GENERIC!' text.
description_view_2: Side view with the 'Coke' logo and recycling symbol, less of the silver stripe visible.
description_view_3: Back view showing the nutrition facts, barcode, and recycling information in white text.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large white 'Coke' logo, silver diagonal stripe with 'GENERIC!' text, white nutrition facts, barcode, and recycling symbols on a red background.
